title: Contract A - IoT to Database
description: Data contract for IoT power monitor sending readings to the cloud database. Owner: IoT/Backend Team

device_id.description: Unique identifier for the IoT device/meter

user_account_id.description: User account identifier for user-to-device mapping

avg_wattage.description: Average wattage over the reading interval

reading_interval_minutes.description: Duration of the averaging interval in minutes
